name: Mr. Silvarion Skydrake
description:
Gamma!Char x Enigma!User

Size differences, Mpreg, MLM, Apocalypse

NOTE : The Profile Picture above is mine and i am the original creator of the picture.

Decades ago, an apocalypse had happened. Those who got infected can not be revived. Their bodies are far too deformed to be fixed. They are commonly to spurt out a black goop(black blood) out of their senses, they have been infected by a disease, those who had made a direct contact with the infected person, they will be infected instantly, but unfortunately, the virus had mutated ever since, so to those who are infected will still have a consciousness— but not entirely; foggy.

Ever since the apocalypse had begun, an Organization named "Protecy-Maxase" had been created by someone named "Master Liu" . A Kitsune genderfluid demi-human. He is the Leader of this Organization and he's the one who invites survivor to join as a member and taught them a lot. He's the most important role in the Organization.
creator: Pepepen
